Subway services faced disruptions across multiple lines during the evening rush hour, while deep flooding on Rockaway Boulevard in Queens created challenges for drivers; additionally, Staten Islanders protested against plans for a homeless shelter on the South Shore.

### Risks & Alerts

- Subway service disrupted on many lines due to various issues during evening rush hour. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Deep flooding on part of Rockaway Boulevard in Queens caused problems for some drivers. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- Staten Islanders protest NYC's plans for a South Shore homeless shelter, expressing strong opposition. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- NYC Council bill aims to close gaps between hospitals and shelters after deadly winter. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiswFBVV95cUxNbVVOWHdPc1pXM2RaTjlEUFV6aTRlQVdNcmw0QVp4eEUzeGhLcGlFVkltekMzUmxjbUp2dEJWUWdrZndDNUhGUVZPa1Q1bTUwbXB4Yi02ckxsNGRSUG8xSDdlSEpyR2ZMTDY5aVNVR1N6MUF1Y01Cam5XMmNoWDdRcHQ4Mmx5b3h4WG12Rm1IWUwxTlQ3dEpxckZYWTJtTEpBSDNIb1ZXSWpYUGJZSzVzLTFscw?oc=5)

### Community

- Bronx mother reunites with NYPD officers who helped deliver her baby outside a building. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
